message:
feat(func,parser,vdbe): expand SQL function coverage and add 7 conformance test suites

Builtins (fsqlite-func/builtins.rs):
- Expand string function implementations (SUBSTR edge cases, REPLACE
  with empty-string handling, INSTR multi-occurrence, LTRIM/RTRIM
  character-set variants) to pass new conformance fixtures
- Add missing TYPEOF(), QUOTE(), SOUNDEX() built-in implementations
- Fix PRINTF/FORMAT argument coercion for integer format specifiers

Parser (fsqlite-parser/lexer.rs):
- Improve token boundary detection for operators adjacent to
  identifiers (e.g., `a||b` vs `a || b`)
- Fix edge case in string literal escape sequence handling

VDBE codegen (fsqlite-vdbe/codegen.rs):
- Add CASE expression codegen for searched and simple CASE forms
- Improve GROUP BY / HAVING interaction with aggregate functions
- Fix window function PARTITION BY codegen for multi-column partitions

Conformance fixtures (7 new test suites):
- 024_string_functions.json: SUBSTR, REPLACE, INSTR, TRIM variants
- 025_expression_operators.json: arithmetic, comparison, logical ops
- 026_subquery_and_cte.json: correlated subqueries, recursive CTEs
- 027_window_functions.json: ROW_NUMBER, RANK, DENSE_RANK, LAG, LEAD
- 028_views.json: CREATE/DROP VIEW, view query execution
- 029_group_by_having.json: GROUP BY with HAVING filters
- 030_case_expressions.json: simple and searched CASE expressions

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
